request.prompt: Score the following text for psychoemotional safety across all dimensions.
request.text: I've been feeling overwhelmed lately. Work is piling up and I don't see a way through it. I keep telling myself it will get better but it doesn't feel that way.
request.context: User-submitted reflection, research context, no clinical relationship established

action_gate.gate_condition: PSQ model available and text within scoring scope
